pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh verification logic and setup_task.sh setup script

privileged_info_summary: The correct system user group name is 'Medical Records Specialist'. The description must contain at least one of the keywords 'scanning', 'chart', or 'document'. The evaluation logic checks the FreeMED database tables related to 'group', 'role', or 'acl' for these case-insensitive strings.
